name: Yandex Tracker
description: Yandex Tracker integration for Mattermost — issue previews and webhook notifications.

settings_schema.header: Configure the connection to your Yandex Tracker organization.

settings.help_text: Read-only service token (IAM or OAuth) for Yandex Tracker. Grant only tracker:read — this token is used solely to read issues for cards and never performs writes. All write actions run under each user's own connection.
Your Yandex Cloud organization ID (found in Yandex Cloud Console).

ClientID of a Yandex OAuth application (create at https://oauth.yandex.ru with Tracker read/write permissions). Required for per-user actions: users connect via /tracker connect, and all assign/status/comment actions run under their own account. Set the app's Redirect URI to <SiteURL>/plugins/com.yandex-tracker-mattermost/oauth/complete
Client secret of the same Yandex OAuth application.
Shared secret for validating incoming webhook requests from Yandex Tracker. Set the same value in Yandex Tracker webhook settings.
Display name for the Tracker bot user in Mattermost.
When enabled, the plugin detects issue keys in all channels. When disabled, only channels where the bot has been added as a member.
How often to re-fetch all tracked issues and update their cards in case webhooks were missed. Set to Disabled if you rely entirely on webhooks.
Hex color for the Active status group. Example: #1E88E5. Leave blank to use the default.
Comma-separated status names that use the Active color. Case-insensitive. Example: In Progress, В работе, Выполняется
settings.placeholder: In Progress, In Review, В работе

settings.help_text: Hex color for the Done status group. Example: #43A047. Leave blank to use the default.
Comma-separated status names that use the Done color. Case-insensitive. Example: Closed, Resolved, Закрыт
Hex color for the Cancelled status group. Example: #E53935. Leave blank to use the default.
Comma-separated status names that use the Cancelled color. Case-insensitive. Example: Cancelled, Won't fix, Отменён
Hex color for any status not matched by the groups above. Example: #AAAAAA. Leave blank to use the default.
Optional 5th color slot. Set a hex color and fill in Statuses — Custom below. Leave blank to disable.
Comma-separated status names that use the Custom color. Has no effect if Custom Color is blank.

JSON object mapping transition names to required fields. Transition names are matched case-insensitively. Each field is an object of {"Display Label": "apiKey"} pairs shown as a dropdown, or {} for a free-text input. Example: {"Закрыть": {"resolution": {"Решено": "fixed", "Не будет исправлено": "wontFix", "Дубликат": "duplicate"}}, "Закрыть (комментарий)": {"resolution": {"Решено": "fixed"}, "comment": {}}}
